programme.title: Ghosts of Devil's Perch
programme.desc: Dave Schrader, Cindy Kaza and K.D. Stafford have identified the dark entity behind the trouble in Butte; they must confront this monster hundreds of feet below the ground in what could prove to be the most harrowing paranormal battle of their lives.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ghosts of Devil's Perch
programme.desc: A family is plagued by poltergeist activity and a menacing shadow figure who visits their small son; Dave Schrader, Cindy Kaza and K.D. Stafford wonder if this house could be connected to the vices of old and the darker side of Butte.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ghosts of Devil's Perch
programme.desc: A terrified couple calls Cindy Kaza, Dave Schrader and K.D. Stafford to their home after the wife wakes to a dark figure choking her; the team's investigation reveals that this house may hold the key to what is haunting Butte and why.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ghosts of Devil's Perch
programme.desc: Dave, Cindy and K.D. investigate a terrifying encounter with an entity in the Cabbage Patch, a former shanty town with a sordid past; the haunting hits close to home when one of the team is attacked by an unseen force and rushed to the hospital.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.sub-title: Couple Spots UFO Over Military Base in California and More
programme.desc: A shadow figure sneaks around an abandoned Seattle restaurant; a roadside apparition chases after two motorcyclists in India; a California couple is baffled by a mysterious immobile object in the sky.

programme.desc: An Ohio man is horrified when his wife's doll collection comes to life; a UFO looms over a couple's house in Virginia; a toddler's ghostly playmate torments a family in Texas.

programme.sub-title: The Haunted Hill House in Texas and More

programme.desc: A ghostly white figure lurks above a child's crib in England; a terrifying jinn in Saudi Arabia grows more powerful as a man attempts to capture proof of its existence; spirits try to trap a paranormal investigator inside an empty tomb.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: Amy, Adam and Chip investigate the infamous Harrisville Farmhouse; they call upon the entire Perron family to help expose the truth behind the horrific haunting.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: Answering the call of a couple suffering from paranormal attacks; the wife fears an entity is possessing her husband, causing blackouts and fits of anger.

programme.title: Attack of the Yeti
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Evans and a team of scientists embark on a dangerous expedition in the Himalayas to investigate recent sightings of a mysterious giant; using cutting-edge analysis, they attempt to confirm if they've uncovered new evidence of the Yeti.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.sub-title: The Dark Pyramid and Violent Nature
programme.desc: A top-secret government facility beneath the Alaskan wilderness may be hiding an extraterrestrial pyramid; strange forces within the Alaska Triangle are making wildlife more aggressive toward humans.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.sub-title: Bigfoot Island and Aliens of Kodiak
programme.desc: A Sasquatch colony terrorizes the residents of remote Prince of Wales Island; decades of UFO sightings on Kodiak Island lead many to believe that aliens are working with the US military.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.sub-title: The Kodiak Dinosaur and Disappearing Planes
programme.desc: A sonar recording may prove that a prehistoric monster stalks the seas surrounding Kodiak Island; researchers investigate why thousands of airplanes have disappeared without a trace in the Alaska Triangle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.sub-title: Gold Rush Ghost Town and Little Demons
programme.desc: A ghost hunter seeks out spirits from the gold rush in Skagway, Alaska; tiny demonic creatures may be behind thousands of strange disappearances in the Alaska Triangle.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: Dark forces disrupt a paranormal investigation at an old fairground near Fairbanks, Alaska; hundreds of Alaskans go missing every year.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.sub-title: The Ghosts of Independence Mine and Alaskan Yeti
programme.desc: A team of ghost hunters reaches out to the dead in an abandoned gold mine; numerous sightings and strange disappearances suggest a fearsome yeti inhabits the frozen landscape of the Alaskan mountains.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.sub-title: UFOs of the Triangle and Alaska's Lost World
programme.desc: The Alaskan skies are filled with unexplainable lights and objects, but evidence suggests these extraterrestrial visitors are landing; prehistoric monsters may be alive and well in the Alaska Triangle.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: Hostile Sasquatches leave the wilderness behind for Alaska's major cities; a paranormal investigator searches for evidence of ghosts at an infamous haunted hotel.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.sub-title: The Mysteries of Ketchikan and The Wendigo

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: Ominous sounds from the skies could be a sign of the impending apocalypse; drivers are spooked by phantom headlights and ghostly hitchhikers along Alaska's haunted highways.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: In the heart of The Fork, Russell is on the trail of a possible pair of Bigfoot; Mireya and Biko utilize cutting-edge tech to try and catch a base camp intruder as Bryce makes a startling find while reviewing footage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: Deep in "The Fork," Russell rappels a 700-foot cliff to follow a heat signature; Mireya and Biko track signs outside their base camp; Bryce hears new information about strange vocalizations and discovers that someone has visited his command center.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Friends Jack Osbourne and Jason Mewes venture deep into the woods of northern Idaho to find out for themselves if this infamous creature is real or simply an age-old legend.

programme.title: Capital Living
programme.desc: A real show, highlighting real stories of our neighborhoods, culture, and real estate. Emmy nominated production team.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: The Paramount Theatre in Asbury Park, N.J.; its bright future is marred by a tragic past.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: Disaster and utter isolation have allowed spirits to fester on a desolate island off the coast of Newport, R.I., leading to reports of terrifying paranormal activity from employees and guests.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Lost Monster Files
programme.desc: The team investigates recent encounters with a monstrous apex predator in the wilderness of British Columbia; using never-before-seen clues from Ivan Sanderson's lost archive, they uncover new evidence that may finally distinguish fact from fiction.

programme.title: Lost Monster Files
programme.desc: A mysterious apex predator is stalking orcas and boats off the coast of Kodiak, AK; sea monster sightings, first studied by Sanderson before his death, have spiked in that area recently.

programme.title: Lost Monster Files
programme.desc: The team investigates a stranger-than-fiction murder mystery involving the Wildman of Minnesota; known as the Ice Man, its body became a sideshow attraction that Sanderson examined himself before it mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Lost Monster Files
programme.desc: The team makes a discovery while investigating sightings of a large bird of prey terrorizing Chestnut Ridge, Pennsylvania; Sanderson believes it to be the mysterious thunderbird, a razor-clawed predator documented in Native folklore.

programme.title: Lost Monster Files
programme.desc: The team investigates a series of livestock mutilations in the Great Smoky Mountains that some link to the infamous chupacabra; using evidence journals from Sanderson's archive plus new clues, the team attempts to confront the killer canine.

programme.title: Lost Monster Files
programme.desc: When Ozarks locals report frightening encounters with a mysterious, dragon-like beast, the team conducts their most ambitious hunt yet.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: This infamous psychiatric hospital in rural Connecticut is so diseased with dark history and demonic energy that it may be the final nail in the coffin for the team.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
